description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build and deploy, using the golang:1.8 Docker image for all jobs and a global before_script that runs `ls -la`, `pwd`, `mkdir -p /go/src/gitlab.com/sorenmat/certgen`, `cp -r * /go/src/gitlab.com/sorenmat/certgen`, `cd /go/src/gitlab.com/sorenmat/certgen`, and `export CUR_WD=`pwd``. Add a build-and-test job in the build stage that executes `cd $CUR_WD`, `make setup`, and `make ci`, and publishes the `certgen` directory as an artifact. Add a build-docker job in the deploy stage that depends on build-and-test and runs `cd $CUR_WD` followed by `go get -v github.com/goreleaser/goreleaser` to fetch Goreleaser for Docker image creation.
